zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Griffith於1470年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾時，她的父親William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd56歲，母親Alice Dalton48歲。她於1476年與Sir Thomas Salusbury在威爾士結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1516年在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾利安德加享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Griffith于1470年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾时，她的父亲William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd56岁，母亲Alice Dalton48岁。她于1476年与Sir Thomas Salusbury在威尔士结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1516年在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾利安德加享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Griffith was born in 1470, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, her father, William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd, was 56 and her mother, Alice Dalton, was 48. She married Sir Thomas Salusbury in 1476, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1516, in Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Griffith est née en 1470, à Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Alice Dalton, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Salusbury en 1476, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1516, à Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Griffith 1470 in Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd 56 und ihre Mutter Alice Dalton 48. Sie hat 1476 in Wales Sir Thomas Salusbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1516 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Griffith è nata il nel 1470 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, sua padre, William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Alice Dalton, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Salusbury nel 1476, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1516, nel Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Griffithが1470年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Fychan Ap Pengruffwndは56歳，母Alice Daltonは48歳であった。1476年にウェールズでSir Thomas Salusburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1516年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアランデガイで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Griffith(이)가 1470년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Dalton(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 1476년 웨일스에서 Sir Thomas Salusbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1516년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 랜데가이에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Griffith nasceu em 1470, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Alice Dalton, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Salusbury em 1476, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1516, em Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Griffith родилась в 1470 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Dalton, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Salusbury в 1476 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1516 г. в местности лландегеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Griffith nació en 1470, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Alice Dalton, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Salusbury en 1476, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1516, en Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
